mascot_message: Hi! I've updated our Community rules. Before we continue, please read and accept them so we're on the same page! (´• ω •`)
text:
USER AGREEMENT AND PRIVACY POLICY
CL (Clegendary Launcher)

1. GENERAL PROVISIONS
This Agreement governs the relationship between the user and the developer of CL (Clegendary Launcher). By downloading, installing, or using the Launcher, you unconditionally agree to be bound by all terms and conditions of this Agreement. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must immediately cease all use of the application and delete it from your device.

2. LICENSE AND RIGHTS
You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Launcher solely for personal, non-commercial purposes. The Launcher is provided free of charge.

PERMITTED:

Decompilation and analysis of the program code strictly for educational and informational purposes.

PROHIBITED:

Using the source code or resources of the Launcher to create derivative works, clones, or competitive services.

Using the application for fraudulent activities, distribution of malware, or any illegal actions.

Selling, leasing, or renting access to the Launcher.

3. PRIVACY AND DATA COLLECTION
We respect your privacy. The Launcher collects a MINIMAL amount of technical data:

Launcher version information (required for automated update checks).

We DO NOT collect passwords, personal files, browser history, or any other personally identifiable information (PII).

We do not share or sell any data to third parties.

4. DISCLAIMER
The software is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. The developer makes no warranties regarding the error-free operation of the software and shall not be held liable for:

Any direct or indirect damages, data loss, or hardware malfunctions.

The functionality or content of third-party mods, servers, or skins.

5. NO AFFILIATION WITH MOJANG/MICROSOFT
CL (Clegendary Launcher) is an independent project and is NOT an official product of Mojang AB or Microsoft Corporation. We strongly encourage you to purchase a licensed version of Minecraft at the official website: minecraft.net. The purpose of this software is not to promote or support piracy.

6. TERMINATION
The developer reserves the right to terminate support for the Launcher or revoke your license to use the software at any time, without prior notice, in the event of a breach of this Agreement.

7. AMENDMENTS TO TERMS
This Agreement may be updated by the developer at any time. Continued use of the Launcher following any such changes constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.

8. CONTACT INFORMATION
If you have any questions or concerns, you may contact the administration via Discord: clegendary.
